---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-27"
---



```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)
library(patchwork)
library(ggvenn)
library(randomForest)
library(forcats)

```

####Venn
```{r}
merged_all = readRDS("/mnt/beegfs/labs/DiGenomaLab/rfhap/analysis/classification_comparison/random_forest/train-v03/all_comparison.rds")
```

```{r cars}
comparison_hg002 = merged_all %>% filter(dataset == "HG002") %>% select(-norm_trainv03)
head(comparison_hg002)
saveRDS(comparison_hg002, "hg002_classif_comparison.rds")
```



```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
df <- comparison_hg002
```

```{r}
n_total <- nrow(df)

matches_all <- df %>% filter(hifiasm == trio_binning & hifiasm == no_norm_trainv03)
n_all <- nrow(matches_all); pct_all <- round(n_all / n_total * 100, 2)

matches_hifi_trio <- df %>% filter(hifiasm == trio_binning)
n_hifi_trio <- nrow(matches_hifi_trio); pct_hifi_trio <- round(n_hifi_trio / n_total * 100, 2)

matches_hifi_nonorm <- df %>% filter(hifiasm == no_norm_trainv03)
n_hifi_nonorm <- nrow(matches_hifi_nonorm); pct_hifi_nonorm <- round(n_hifi_nonorm / n_total * 100, 2)

matches_trio_nonorm <- df %>% filter(trio_binning == no_norm_trainv03)
n_trio_nonorm <- nrow(matches_trio_nonorm); pct_trio_nonorm <- round(n_trio_nonorm / n_total * 100, 2)

resumen <- tibble::tibble(
  comparison = c("3-way (all equal)", "hifiasm == trio_binning", "hifiasm == no_norm", "trio_binning == no_norm"),
  count = c(n_all, n_hifi_trio, n_hifi_nonorm, n_trio_nonorm),
  pct = c(pct_all, pct_hifi_trio, pct_hifi_nonorm, pct_trio_nonorm)
)
print(resumen)
```

```{r}
venn_sets <- list(
  hifi_trio    = matches_hifi_trio$read_id,
  hifi_nonorm  = matches_hifi_nonorm$read_id,
  trio_nonorm  = matches_trio_nonorm$read_id
)

# Mostrar conteos en la consola (regiones del Venn)
A <- venn_sets$hifi_trio
B <- venn_sets$hifi_nonorm
C <- venn_sets$trio_nonorm
```

```{r}
only_A <- setdiff(A, union(B, C))
only_B <- setdiff(B, union(A, C))
only_C <- setdiff(C, union(A, B))

AandB_only <- setdiff(intersect(A, B), C)
AandC_only <- setdiff(intersect(A, C), B)
BandC_only <- setdiff(intersect(B, C), A)

AandBandC <- Reduce(intersect, list(A, B, C))

```

```{r}
cat("Regiones (conteos):\n")
tibble::tibble(
  region = c("only_hifi_trio","only_hifi_nonorm","only_trio_nonorm",
             "hifi_trio & hifi_nonorm only", "hifi_trio & trio_nonorm only", "hifi_nonorm & trio_nonorm only",
             "triple"),
  count = c(length(only_A), length(only_B), length(only_C),
            length(AandB_only), length(AandC_only), length(BandC_only),
            length(AandBandC))
) %>% print()

```

```{r}
names(venn_sets) <- c(
  "Hifiasm Trio",
  "RFHap",
  "TrioBinning"
)
```

```{r}
comparison=ggvenn(
  venn_sets,
  c("Hifiasm Trio", "RFHap", "TrioBinning"),
  show_elements = FALSE,
  stroke_size = 0.3,
  set_name_size = 20,
  text_size = 15
) + ggplot2::ggtitle("Reads classification intersection between methods") +
  ggplot2::theme(
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 60)
  )

```

##Importance
```{r}
rf_model=readRDS("/mnt/beegfs/labs/DiGenomaLab/rfhap/processing/rfhap/results/HG002/HG002_dataset/rf/train/HG002_standar_ont_sup_PAW70337.fastq_fastkm_matrix_rf_model.rds")

```

```{r}

varimplot=varImpPlot(rf_model,main="Importance of features")
varimplot=as.data.frame(varimplot)
varimplot$feature=row.names(varimplot)
```

```{r}
plot_importance=varimplot %>% mutate(feature = fct_reorder(feature, MeanDecreaseGini)) %>% ggplot(aes(x = MeanDecreaseGini, y = feature)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.6) +  # Adjust size and transparency
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0) +  # Add jitter for better visibility
  theme_minimal() +  # Use a minimal theme
  labs(title = "Feature Importance", x = "MeanDecreaseGini", y = "Feature") +
  theme(text=element_text(size=35),axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,size = 60)) 

png("importance.png", width = 2000 , height = 2000)
plot_importance
dev.off()

plot_importance

```
###Prediction
```{r}
library(data.table)
prob = read.table("/mnt/beegfs/labs/DiGenomaLab/rfhap/processing/rfhap/results/HG002/HG002_dataset/rf/prediction/HG002_standar_ont_sup_PAW71238.fastq_fastkm_matrix.9_rf_prediction.txt", sep =" ", header =TRUE)
```

```{r}
prob_plot=ggplot(prob, aes(x = Predicted.prob.A, y = Predicted.prob.B, color = Predicted.Class)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "A",
    y = "B",
    color = "Clase Predicha"
  ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1), expand = c(0, 0)) + 
  theme_minimal()  + theme(legend.position = "none", text=element_text(size=50)) + ggtitle("Probability distribution for RandomForest Classification")

prob_plot
```

```{r}
library(patchwork)
png("super_figure.png", width = 5200 , height = 2500)
(plot_importance| comparison| prob_plot) 
dev.off()
```
